Perhaps it would be a good idea to make an agility rll at this point, hmmmm? In the room the PCs see a number of desks —all empty but one, where a Red Tech staf- fer sits studying some manuals. amine Grund-G's documents, then leads the

partment is about as spacious as the interior (fa sub-compact station wagon. Drop the side-view illustration, labeled “JOGC.MTV.SV:3.4” in front of the players. Wait until the gasps of awe subside. ‘The MTV was designed for four passengers. With Grund:G, six Troubleshooters, three In- 
frareds, two bots, and gear, things are going to be crowded, But not quite crowded enough to suit us, so it’s time to put on the environment suis.
